descriptions.barChart: Compare values across categories with grouped bars.
descriptions.codeFromScratch: Write custom code to build fully tailored analyses or visuals.
descriptions.correlationalHypothesis: Hypothesis about how two variables relate to each other.
descriptions.experimentalHypothesis: Plan controlled experimental designs and compare outcomes.
descriptions.histogram: Show the distribution of values in your dataset.
descriptions.oneWayAnova: Compare means across three or more groups in one test.
descriptions.pearsonCorrelation: Measure linear association strength between two continuous variables.
descriptions.scatterPlot: Visualize relationships between two continuous variables.
descriptions.summary: Generate key descriptive statistics for selected data (mean, median, mode, etc.).
descriptions.table: Insert a structured table to show your dataset values.
descriptions.textBlock: Add notes, interpretation, and context to your analysis.
descriptions.tTest: Compare means between two groups and test significance.

database.csvDownloadMessage: Give a name to the CSV you're about to download\nNo need to add '.csv' we're taking care of that!
